TL:DR Helldivers 2 is a 3rd person shooter game where the main gameplay loop is to go down into maps and complete objectives, and then once the objectives are complete you will the extract. Through each map are enemy bases and patrols in which will summon hordes of reinforcements that you actively fight with mobs ranging from enemy's that can easily be killed with small arms fire and larger mobs that require more coordination and special weapons like anti tank / explosive. 
The player is given a primary, secondary, special slot ( Grenades ) and a armor set with passives that they can choose from and 4 " Stratagem " slots that are essentially special abilities that can be used for various things such as orbital missle strikes or supply packages containing specialized weapons that the player can use.
The game features 2 different factions you can fight from with various sub factions in each one and multiple different planets and biomes you can fight them in, with a 3rd faction nearing release.
There is also a galactic war aspect that all players participate in but i dont rly want to explain that, but thats basically the game
